# Daraja 4.0

> Agent-forward toolkit for M-Pesa Daraja API integration. SDK with 6 methods, MCP server with 8 tools, 19-doc knowledge base.

## SDK

- @daraja-4/sdk: Zero-config M-Pesa SDK. Methods: collect, send, status, balance, reverse, qr. 20+ error codes mapped with prevention guidance.

## Capabilities

- [Collect Payments](capabilities/collect-payments.md): Accept M-Pesa payments via STK Push (auto-polling, no callbacks needed)
- [Send Money](capabilities/send-money.md): Send money from business to customer (B2C salary, disbursement, refund)
- [Check Status](capabilities/check-status.md): Query the status of any M-Pesa transaction
- [Refunds](capabilities/refunds.md): Reverse or refund a completed M-Pesa transaction
- [Account Balance](capabilities/account-balance.md): Check your M-Pesa shortcode or till balance
- [QR Payments](capabilities/qr-payments.md): Generate QR codes customers scan to pay via M-Pesa
- [Business Payments](capabilities/business-payments.md): Pay other businesses (B2B PayBill, BuyGoods) — raw API, not yet in SDK

## Concepts

- [Authentication](concepts/authentication.md): OAuth 2.0 tokens, SecurityCredential encryption, certificate handling
- [Callbacks](concepts/callbacks.md): Daraja async callback pattern — setup, security, local dev with ngrok
- [Environments](concepts/environments.md): Sandbox vs production — URLs, credentials, shortcodes, certificates
- [Going Live](concepts/going-live.md): Complete go-live process from sandbox to production

## Errors

- [Error Codes](errors/error-codes.md): Complete Daraja error code reference with causes and fixes
- [Troubleshooting](errors/troubleshooting.md): Decision trees for common integration issues

## Patterns

- [Donation Page](patterns/donation-page.md): Accept donations with STK Push — complete Express + HTML example
- [E-commerce Checkout](patterns/ecommerce-checkout.md): Integrate M-Pesa into product checkout flows
- [Subscription Billing](patterns/subscription-billing.md): Recurring M-Pesa payments with cron-based re-prompting
- [B2C Disbursement](patterns/b2c-disbursement.md): Send money to multiple recipients — batch processing pattern
- [Resilience](patterns/resilience.md): Retry patterns, exponential backoff, deduplication, circuit breaker for M-Pesa integrations
- [Callback Testing](patterns/callback-testing.md): Callback URL testing, troubleshooting, local dev setup with ngrok/cloudflared
